channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Waltz: Trump Admin 'Laser Focused' on Iran's Nuclear Program
item.description: The Trump administration is intensely focused on Iran's nuclear program as U.S. and Iranian officials hold talks in Switzerland, said U.S. Ambassador...

item.title: Pence Criticizes Iran Deal in Opinion Piece
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence opposed the U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding in an opinion piece, praising the Trump administration's approach.

item.title: Obama Center is not a traditional presidential library; critics call it an activism hub
item.description: Critics argue the Obama Presidential Center on Chicago parkland functions as an activism center for his foundation, not a standard presidential library.

item.title: Jasmine Crockett Sparks Controversy With Comments About James Talarico
